content.en:
The road map obtained from the Ten Directions Sword Ancestor recorded the coordinates of the exotic worlds one by one, and he only needed to directly tear apart the barriers of the exotic worlds according to these coordinates, and descend on these exotic worlds to reach an eternal heaven and earth.

According to the instructions on the road map, he needs to cross 298 exotic worlds to reach the nearest exotic world to the eternal world, and then enter the source sea, from the source sea to the eternal world, after all, ordinary invincible people can't tear the barrier of the eternal world at all, they can only enter the eternal world from the source sea.

Ye Tian wrote down this road map, and let the copy body go to the Eternal Heaven and Earth, so that even if it fell, it would not endanger his life.

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, he crossed one exotic world after another, and in a few days, he came to the exotic world closest to the eternal world.

This exotic world is called Wave Valley, Ye Tian directly entered the Source Sea from the Wave Valley Heaven and Earth, and immediately saw an incomparably huge phantom, this phantom is an eternal heaven and earth.

Ye Tian could only vaguely sense the existence of the Eternal Heaven and Earth, so the distance between the two sides was still very far.

So, it took Ye Tian a few years to fly to the vicinity of this eternal world.

At this time, he noticed that there were portals around the phantom.

"That's the Third Order Gate!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Because he was able to build the second-order gates himself, and the second-order gates were far inferior to these gates, so it can be seen that they were third-order gates.

The third-order gate can accommodate the invincible, so that the invincible can enter the eternal world through the third-order gate.

As for the Supreme One, where do you still need a third-order gate, it is estimated that you can easily enter the Eternal Heaven and Earth.

Therefore, it is enough for the Eternal Heaven and Earth to build these third-order gates.

From the information from the Ten Directions Sword Ancestor, if you want to enter the Eternal Heaven and Earth, it is not without a price, you must pay a certain amount of Origin Rules to rob the crystal.

Although the Eternal Heaven and Earth are good, there is no Great Tribulation, so there is no way to give birth to the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, so the Eternal Heaven and Earth use the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal as a toll.

In this way, the Eternal Heaven and Earth could obtain countless Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals without paying any price.

Wow!

Ye Tian flew to a third-order gate and was immediately stopped by an invincible person.

This invincible person's aura was terrifying, far beyond Ye Tian's imagination, and he was obviously an incomparably powerful invincible.

"Strange Invincible, do you want to pay an Origin Rule Heist Crystal as a toll, or do you apply for a perpetual eternal order?" the invincible asked.

"Apply for the Eternal Eternal Order!" Ye Tian said.

If you don't apply for the Eternal Order, then every time you enter and leave the Eternal World, you need to pay an Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

Maybe once or twice, that's nothing, but if it's going in and out dozens of times, hundreds or even tens of thousands of times, then the amount of Origin Rule Robbery Crystals will be more.

And to handle the Eternal Order, only 1,000 Origin Rule Robbery Crystals are required, so most of the invincible people will handle the Eternal Order, and only some new invincible people who don't have many Origin Rule Robbery Crystals on their bodies and can't afford the Eternal Order, will choose to pay an Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

Soon, Ye Tian went through the formalities, paid 1,000 Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, and obtained an Eternal Order.

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered this eternal world.

-------------------

This eternal heaven and earth is called the Heavenly Qi Realm, the Heavenly Qi Realm is extremely huge, divided into hundreds of thousands of regions, each area has countless trading giant cities, no one knows how many invincible people live here, many invincible people are outsiders, living here permanently.

However, living in the Heavenly Qi Realm is not without a price, a Great Tribulation Time requires the payment of an Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, and this is true for anyone, and no one can avoid it.

If you want to rely on hiding and not hand over the Origin Rules to rob the crystal, then the end will be very miserable, and no one will be able to hide.

Although Ye Tian handled the Eternal Order, this was only a waiver of entry and exit fees, if he stayed in the Heavenly Qi Realm for a great tribulation time, he still had to pay an Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal.

After entering the Heavenly Qi Realm, Ye Tian was very low-key, and he did not use his divine sense to probe the situation around him, in case he provoked a powerful and bad-tempered invincible, maybe he would attack him.

The last thing that the Heavenly Qi Realm could not provoke was the eight eternal name-level forces, and each of them had at least one supreme being.

Under the eight eternal name-level forces, there are more than a hundred saint-name-level forces, and if you want to become a saint-name-level force, the requirements are also very high, and you must have a first-class invincible.

As for the super-famous forces, there are even more of them.

Basically, as long as you don't provoke the eternal name level forces and the holy name level forces, the new invincible people are relatively safe, and there are fights in the Tianqi Realm, but there are very few, especially in the trading giant city, it is forbidden to fight.

Ye Tian came to the Tianqi Realm this time, not only to comprehend an invincible ancestral skill, but also to join a force.

Although he has the talent for copying, if he doesn't have the power to rely on, it will be difficult for him to obtain some inheritance knowledge, and it will be difficult for him to grow up.

Knowledge is very important, if it weren't for him threatening or infiltrating foreign forces one by one and gaining a lot of knowledge, otherwise he would not have been able to enter the realm of the invincible, not even the strongest.

And joining a certain force is equivalent to having a backer, and before you grow up, you don't have to worry about security.

It's like he once joined the battle gate when he was weak, and the war gate helped him a lot, and blessed him, if it wasn't for the protection of the war gate, he would have died I don't know how many times, and copying talent can't save his life!

But he also knew very well that those eternal name-level forces and saint-name level forces in the Heavenly Qi Realm would not easily recruit invincible people, and only those weak supername-level forces would be in a hurry to recruit invincible people to expand their power.

Ye Tian had no interest in super-name-level forces, his minimum requirement was a saint-level force, and it was best to join an eternal name-level force.

Heavenly Qi Realm, Absolute Martial Zone, Absolute Martial City.

This is a fairly well-known trading giant city in the Tianqi Realm, and many forces have branches here.

Ye Tian came here, firstly, to trade the robbed bones on his body, and secondly, to buy some knowledge and inquire about how to join those Saint-level and Eternal Name-level forces.

After coming to Absolute Martial City, he found that the cultivation level here was very high, and there were naturally not many invincible people, but there were many cultivators who were comparable to the Ancestors, and the weakest ones were comparable to the Domain Ancestors.

Soon, Ye Tian came to a shop in Juewu City.
